top_signals.title: China May wholesale inflation hits near 4-year high on Iran war, AI costs; CPI misses
top_signals.summary: Price growth has been boosted by a surge in global commodity costs, as the Middle East conflict disrupted energy and raw material flows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Washington man gets 5 years for helping $100 million crypto money laundering scheme
top_signals.summary: Geoffrey K. Auyeung helped overseas fraudsters launder $100 million in scam proceeds through crypto and bank accounts, according to the DOJ.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Mexico’s gripe with U.S. trade pact: South Korea has better deal
top_signals.summary: Mexican government officials have shown evidence that the average tariff on Mexican auto exports is almost 19%, higher than the 15% levies on some vehicles imported from Asia.
